name: nmeningitidis_mc58_opa_gene_family
description: Opa (opacity-associated) gene family — 11 paralogous loci scattered across the N. meningitidis MC58 chromosome (Op-A through Op-K). Each contains pentanucleotide CTCTT repeats causing phase-variable expression. Inter-paralog identity ~85-95%. PSV disambiguation essential.
